title: Headless hooks design: advisory guards + server-side injection
rationale: For headless Claude Code agents, hooks cannot be deployed. SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit equivalents route through initial stdin prompt and ov serve mail injection loop. Guard rules become advisory (CLAUDE.md instructions only). Tool-event logging is made redundant by stream-json parser. Minimal diff: isHeadless in HooksDef, deployConfig skip, buildInitialHeadlessPrompt, startMailInjectionLoop.

content: headless-hooks-design.md uses cherry-pick pattern: when a writer branch goes stale (would revert merged work), a rebaser agent cherry-picks just the approved commit onto current main using git cherry-pick <sha>
